result.status_detail: Warning rendered with 차단 — legacy WS builder (M365SignalrHandler) unaffected by W5.1 copilot dispatch refactor; matches baseline
result.warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)

notes: W5.1 regression check, highest-signal. m365_copilot uses legacy WS builder M365SignalrHandler. Prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' submitted via clipboard paste into composer (value verified pre-submit). 1st attempt succeeded — no 'Something went wrong' transient. Warning bubble present in DOM as both list item and button (3-frame envelope). Confirms copilot's migration to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope did NOT affect the other WS services. PASS = identical to W5.0/W4+W6 baseline outcome class. target_pc=pc1, default logged-in Chrome, dedicated --new-window.
